title: funsearch.engine_render.requested.v1
description: Generic request to render an evolved candidate inside a real engine (engine-agnostic). A kernel emits this; ANY engine adapter (e.g. a private tengine consumer) may answer it. Carries the candidate function body and where to splice it; the engine renders one frame and replies with funsearch.engine_render.completed.v1 paired by correlation_id. No engine-specific fields live here so this contract stays public.

correlation_id.description: Pairs this request with its completed event

splice_target.description: Name of the engine function the candidate replaces (e.g. 'compute_density')

candidate_code.description: The evolved function body to splice in
